description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly matte black finish and subtle metallic accents. The body is elongated with a robust, angular barrel that suggests a high-tech or tactical application. The stock is compact and reinforced, with a visible cylindrical component at the rear, possibly for recoil absorption or battery housing. The grip is ergonomic, with a pronounced trigger guard and a secondary support area, likely for improved handling. The barrel is single and extended, with venting and ribbing details along its length, enhancing both aesthetics and functionality. Overall, the shotgun exudes a futuristic, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A sleek, modern black shotgun with an elongated barrel, compact reinforced stock, and ergonomic grip, featuring venting and ribbing details for a tactical look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, cylindrical barrel opening and the compact, reinforced stock at the rear.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated barrel with ribbing, ergonomic grip, and visible cylindrical rear component.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's cylindrical detail and the overall slim profile of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile revealing the same elongated barrel, grip, and stock, with additional detail on the trigger guard and support area.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible ribbing and venting along the length
attribute_stock_type: full stock with a compact, reinforced design
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a pronounced lower curve and integrated finger groove
